translation.en: She is very energetic in her work.

content.sentence: Cô ấy rất ___ trong công việc.

notes_md:
**năng** means *diligent, hardworking*, but it’s rarely used alone in modern Vietnamese. You’ll almost always see it inside compounds.

Most common combos: **siêng năng**, **chăm năng** (more natural: *chăm chỉ*). It describes a person who works or studies consistently and seriously.

Strong memory links: **chăm chỉ / siêng năng** (synonyms), **lười** (lazy – opposite).

On its own, *năng* sounds formal or incomplete — think of it as a building block inside bigger words.

translation.en: She is very energetic in her work.

content.sentence: Cô ấy rất ___ trong công việc.

exampleSentencesTranslated: You should be diligent in studying every night to get good results.
He is very diligent at work in the office.
You should be diligent in exercising to stay healthy.

definitions.es: Tener o mostrar mucha energía o entusiasmo.
definitions.vi: Có hoặc thể hiện nhiều năng lượng hoặc nhiệt huyết.
definitions.en: Having or showing a lot of energy or enthusiasm.

notes:
năng means diligent, hardworking, but it’s rarely used alone in modern Vietnamese. You’ll almost always see it inside compounds.

Most common combos: siêng năng, chăm năng (more natural: chăm chỉ). It describes a person who works or studies consistently and seriously.

Strong memory links: chăm chỉ / siêng năng (synonyms), lười (lazy – opposite).

On its own, năng sounds formal or incomplete — think of it as a building block inside bigger words.
exampleSentences: Em luôn năng học bài mỗi tối để đạt kết quả tốt.
Anh ấy là người rất năng trong công việc ở văn phòng.
Chị nên năng luyện tập thể thao để giữ sức khỏe tốt.
